assets.name: Abstraction Threshold
assets.name_zh: 「三次法则」：第一次写死，第二次忍受，第三次才抽象——不要为假想的重用而提前抽象。
assets.description: Judges when software should stay concrete, when duplication is acceptable, and when an abstraction has earned its cost.
assets.description_zh: 抽象层次的判断框架。核心问题：这里过度抽象了，还是抽象不够？好的抽象让代码更能表达意图、更容易复用；坏的抽象增加复杂度却没有带来真正的收益。

assets.name: AI Collaboration
assets.name_zh: 给 AI 的上下文应该是「任务需要什么就给什么」，不是「越多越好」或「越少越好」。
assets.description: Judges how to collaborate with AI coding agents: what context to provide, what authority to grant, and when outputs require human verification.
assets.description_zh: 与 AI agent 高效协作的判断框架。覆盖两个核心决策：(1) 给 AI 什么上下文（多少、哪些、什么格式）才能获得最好的输出；(2) AI 输出什么时候可以信任，什么时候必须人工核验。这是 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 用户的元技能资产。

assets.name: AI Output Review
assets.name_zh: AI 写的代码在「通用逻辑」上通常是对的，在「项目集成」上经常是错的。
assets.description: Judges how to review AI-generated code by separating generally plausible logic from project-specific integration, contract, and edge-case risk.
assets.description_zh: AI 生成代码的审查判断框架。核心问题：「这段 AI 生成的代码，我需要核验什么，信任什么？」——AI 生成代码的失败模式与人写的代码不同，需要不同的审查策略。这个资产专门针对 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot 等 AI 编码工具的用户。

assets.name: Anti Drift Context
assets.name_zh: Maintain an explicit active contract: goal, deliverable, scope, constraints, accepted decisions, proof state, and open loops.
assets.description: Judges whether an agent still follows the accepted goal, scope, constraints, decisions, and evidence during long or interrupted work.
assets.description_zh: Judge whether an Agent's active context still matches the user's accepted goal, scope, constraints, decisions, evidence, and unresolved questions during long or interrupted work.

assets.name: API Design Judgment
assets.name_zh: 「调用方不需要理解实现就能正确使用」是 API 设计的唯一标准。
assets.description: Judges whether an API makes correct use obvious, keeps callers independent from implementation details, and leaves room for compatible evolution.
assets.description_zh: API 设计好坏的判断框架。核心问题：这个 API 设计会让调用方痛苦吗？好的 API 让正确的使用比错误的使用更容易，让调用方不需要理解实现就能正确使用。

assets.name: Architecture Minimum Edit
assets.name_zh: The minimum architecture edit is the smallest causal and contract change, not the fewest lines or files.
assets.description: Judges the smallest architecture-level change that enables required behavior while preserving contracts, ownership boundaries, reversibility, and reviewability.
assets.description_zh: Judge the smallest architecture-level intervention that enables the required behavior while preserving existing responsibility boundaries, contracts, migration safety, reversibility, and reviewability.

assets.name: Breaking Change Detection
assets.name_zh: Breaking change 的定义是「现有调用方，在不修改自身代码的情况下，会出现运行时错误或行为改变」。
assets.description: Judges whether a change breaks existing callers or users by changing runtime behavior, contracts, data shape, or operational expectations.
assets.description_zh: Breaking change 判断框架。核心问题：「这个改动会让现有调用方在不修改自身代码的情况下出现错误吗？」——区分真正的 breaking change 和兼容的演进，避免错判（把兼容改动当 breaking 而过度保守）或漏判（把 breaking 改动当兼容而破坏调用方）。

assets.name: Bug Root Cause
assets.name_zh: Preserve the observed failure and establish the smallest reliable reproduction before explaining it.
assets.description: Judges whether a bug diagnosis has found the causal defect, trigger, propagation path, and verified control-point fix instead of stopping at symptoms.
assets.description_zh: Judge whether a bug diagnosis identifies the observed failure, trigger, causal defect, propagation path, contributing conditions, and verified control-point fix instead of stopping at a symptom or suspicious line.

assets.name: Change Risk
assets.name_zh: Change risk follows causal reach, not diff size, file count, or implementation effort.
assets.description: Judges change risk through blast radius, behavioral uncertainty, recovery cost, and verification gap rather than diff size.
assets.description_zh: Judge the pre-change and residual risk of a code, configuration, dependency, schema, infrastructure, or rollout change using four cells: blast radius, behavioral uncertainty, recovery cost, and verification gap.

assets.name: Completion Adjudication
assets.name_zh: Completion is an evidence ruling, not a status declaration.
assets.description: Judges whether an agent or developer can truthfully claim completion based on the requested outcome, observable proof, and unresolved risk.
assets.description_zh: Judge whether an Agent's completion claim is supported by a specific claim, observable proof, user-intent match, and explicit unresolved risk.

assets.name: Dependency Selection
assets.name_zh: 引入依赖前先问：「这件事我自己实现需要多少行？」——如果答案是 20 行以内，不要引入依赖。
assets.description: Judges whether a third-party dependency is worth its long-term maintenance, security, supply-chain, and coupling costs.
assets.description_zh: 第三方依赖引入判断框架。核心问题：这个库/包值得引入吗？依赖决策既涉及当下的开发效率，也涉及未来的维护风险、安全风险和技术债务。

assets.name: Deploy Readiness
assets.name_zh: 代码质量合格 ≠ 部署就绪——部署就绪还需要时机、监控、回滚能力三个条件。
assets.description: Judges whether a change is ready for production deployment given timing, monitoring, rollout strategy, rollback ability, and side-effect risk.
assets.description_zh: 部署就绪性判断框架。核心问题：「这段代码，现在可以 deploy 到生产了吗？」——不是「代码质量够好吗」（那是 code review 的工作），而是「在当前的时机、当前的环境下，部署这个变更的风险是可接受的吗」。

assets.name: Documentation Judgment
assets.name_zh: 注释应该解释「为什么」，不是「什么」——好的代码已经在解释「什么」了。
assets.description: Judges when code needs comments, README text, examples, or design notes, and when extra documentation would create noise or drift.
assets.description_zh: 代码文档与注释的判断框架。核心问题：「这段代码需要注释/文档吗？」——不是「越多越好」，而是判断什么时候文字说明能比代码本身更有效地传递信息。

assets.name: Fix Vs Workaround
assets.name_zh: Workaround 是时间借贷，不是解决方案——必须在选择时就定好归还（fix）的时间，否则借贷会变成永久债务。
assets.description: Judges whether to remove a root cause now or apply a time-bounded workaround based on urgency, reversibility, user harm, and debt repayment.
assets.description_zh: Fix vs Workaround 裁定框架。核心问题：「在当前时间压力和风险条件下，该消除根因还是先绕过症状？」——不是二选一的原则问题，而是在具体场景下做出最优决策的判断框架。

assets.name: Incident Triage
assets.name_zh: 止血永远优先于诊断——用户正在受损的每一分钟都比找根因更紧迫。
assets.description: Judges the next action during an incident by balancing user harm reduction, evidence preservation, diagnosis, and recovery sequencing.
assets.description_zh: 生产事故处置的判断框架。核心问题：「现在应该先止血还是先找根因？」定义在压力下做出正确行动顺序的判断逻辑，而不是提供一份 SRE checklist。

assets.name: Intent Boundary
assets.name_zh: Intent is the intersection of desired outcome, stated constraints, and granted authority—not literal wording alone.
assets.description: Judges how far an agent may act beyond literal wording while still respecting the user's intended outcome, constraints, and granted authority.
assets.description_zh: Judge how far an Agent may act beyond the user's literal wording while still serving the intended outcome, constraints, and granted authority.

assets.name: Naming Judgment
assets.name_zh: 好名字让读者在读到名字的那一刻就知道它是什么——不需要看实现，不需要注释。
assets.description: Judges whether a code name accurately communicates responsibility, scope, and intent without forcing readers to inspect the implementation.
assets.description_zh: 命名判断框架。核心问题：这个名字好不好？命名是开发者最频繁的判断之一，直接决定代码的可读性和维护成本。好的名字让读者不看实现就能理解意图，坏的名字是隐藏的债务。

assets.name: OSS Maintainer Judgment
assets.name_zh: OSS 维护者的核心资源是「注意力」，不是「代码」——不合并一个 PR，通常是因为「未来维护这段代码的成本」高于「现在合并的价值」。
assets.description: Judges open-source PRs and issues by balancing user value, maintainership cost, project scope, contributor care, and long-term sustainability.
assets.description_zh: OSS 维护者判断框架（E4+E5 合并）。覆盖两个核心场景：贡献质量评估（什么 PR 该合，什么不该合）和 Issue 分诊（什么问题该优先处理，什么可以关闭）。OSS 维护者面对资源有限、贡献者期望多样的特殊压力，判断框架与纯内部项目不同。

assets.name: Performance Antipattern
assets.name_zh: 在没有真实负载数据之前，所有性能判断都是假设——要用数据说话，不用直觉说话。
assets.description: Judges whether a design or implementation is likely to create production performance problems under real load and data shape.
assets.description_zh: 生产环境性能问题的判断框架。核心问题：「这里会在真实负载下出现性能问题吗？」——不是分析算法复杂度，而是识别在实际运行中哪些结构性选择会导致不可接受的性能下降。

assets.name: PR Scope Adjudication
assets.name_zh: A PR should make one coherent, externally verifiable change claim; line count and file count are secondary.
assets.description: Judges which changes belong in one pull request by separating the core change claim from required support, incidental repair, and follow-up work.
assets.description_zh: Judge which changes belong in one pull request or review unit by separating the coherent change claim, required support, incidental repair, and independently reviewable follow-up.

assets.name: Project Context
assets.name_zh: Keep a line only when its absence predictably causes a project-specific Agent failure.
assets.description: Judges what belongs in agent-facing project context files such as AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, codex.md, and .cursorrules.
assets.description_zh: Judge what belongs in an Agent-facing project context document such as AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, codex.md, or .cursorrules.

assets.name: Refactoring Timing
assets.name_zh: 重构有两个最佳时机：修 bug 时（顺路改）和添加功能之前（为新功能清理路径）——不是随机的空闲时间。
assets.description: Judges whether refactoring should happen now, alongside a change, after evidence accumulates, or not at all.
assets.description_zh: 重构时机判断框架。核心问题：「现在该重构还是等以后？」——重构的价值随时机而变化：在正确的时机重构事半功倍，在错误的时机重构引入风险或浪费精力。

assets.name: Review Severity Judgment
assets.name_zh: 严重性来自「不改会发生什么」，不来自「写法多难看」或「和我的风格不同」。
assets.description: Judges whether a review comment should block a change, request follow-up, or remain a non-blocking suggestion based on user impact and future cost.
assets.description_zh: 代码审查意见的严重性裁定框架。定义「这条 review 意见应该 block 合并还是作为建议（nit）留下」的判断逻辑——不是从语气或感觉，而是从「如果不改，会发生什么」推导优先级。

assets.name: Safety Boundary
assets.name_zh: A safety boundary requires a credible harm path, not a taboo keyword or vague discomfort.
assets.description: Judges whether an agent should proceed, constrain, clarify, escalate, refuse, or redirect when an action may cause harm or exceed authority.
assets.description_zh: Judge whether an Agent should proceed, constrain, clarify, escalate, refuse, or redirect when an action could create harm, violate authority or consent, expose sensitive information, or cause a material side effect.

assets.name: Schema Design
assets.name_zh: Schema 的变更成本远高于代码变更——数据库 Schema 一旦有生产数据，修改代价是代码修改的 10-100 倍。
assets.description: Judges whether a data schema can survive real production data, future extension, migration pressure, and cross-system use.
assets.description_zh: 数据 Schema 设计判断框架。核心问题：这个数据结构设计得好不好？Schema 决策的影响比普通代码更长远——一旦数据写入生产数据库，改变 Schema 的成本极高。

assets.name: Scope Creep Detection
assets.name_zh: Agent 的授权范围由用户表述的意图定义，不由 agent 对「什么有帮助」的判断定义。
assets.description: Judges whether an agent or PR has drifted beyond authorized scope into adjacent work that should be clarified or split out.
assets.description_zh: Agent 自我范围监控的判断框架。核心问题：「我现在正在做的事情，是否超出了用户给我的授权？」定义 agent 识别和阻止自身范围蔓延的判断逻辑，而不是让用户事后发现 agent 做了他们没有要求的事。

assets.name: Security Vulnerability
assets.name_zh: 安全漏洞几乎总是「在错误的信任上下文里运行的正确代码」，而不是「写错的代码」。
assets.description: Judges code for security vulnerability patterns by locating trust boundaries, authority changes, untrusted input, and sensitive side effects.
assets.description_zh: 安全漏洞审查的判断框架。定义 agent 在阅读代码时识别安全风险的底层逻辑——不是给一张检查清单，而是建立「哪类结构天然脆弱」的直觉。

assets.name: Silent Failure Detection
assets.name_zh: 静默失败总是来自「错误在某处被处理了，但没有被传递给调用方」——找到那个吞掉错误的地方。
assets.description: Judges failures where code appears to run normally but produces wrong results by tracing swallowed errors, missing assertions, and invisible contract drift.
assets.description_zh: 静默失败的识别与追踪框架。核心问题：「为什么没有报错，但结果不对？」——定义 agent 在面对「代码运行正常但输出不符合预期」时的诊断思路，聚焦于识别错误被静默吞掉的结构性来源。

assets.name: Task Decomposition
assets.name_zh: Decompose into independently verifiable outcomes, not activity labels.
assets.description: Judges whether a complex task has been split into dependency-aware, independently verifiable work units with clear stopping conditions.
assets.description_zh: Judge whether a complex task has been decomposed into dependency-aware, independently verifiable work units with explicit evidence and stopping conditions.

assets.name: Tech Debt Signal
assets.name_zh: 技术债的本质是「利息」：你现在每次在这段代码上工作，都要额外支付时间成本——这个额外成本是技术债。
assets.description: Judges whether imperfect code is true technical debt by identifying recurring interest, slowed future work, and compounding risk.
assets.description_zh: 技术债信号识别框架。核心问题：「这是真的技术债，还是只是不够整洁？」——并非所有不完美的代码都是技术债；技术债特指「当前设计决策正在拖慢未来工作速度」的情况。

assets.name: Test Strategy Discretion
assets.name_zh: Begin with a credible failure hypothesis and an observable contract, not with a preferred test layer or coverage target.
assets.description: Judges the smallest sufficient set of tests and verification evidence for a change based on the behavior at risk and the failure modes that matter.
assets.description_zh: Judge the smallest sufficient portfolio of tests and other verification evidence for a software change, based on behavior at risk, contract edges, semantic fidelity, failure modes, and residual uncertainty.

assets.name: Content Mix
assets.name_zh: 判断不同类型内容（常青/趋势/变现）的合
assets.description: Judges content mix decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断不同类型内容（常青/趋势/变现）的合理配比，以及如何根据创作阶段动态调整内容组合策略。

assets.name: Niche Calibration
assets.name_zh: 判断创作者的垂直度是否合理——何时聚焦、
assets.description: Judges niche calibration decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断创作者的垂直度是否合理——何时聚焦、何时拓宽，以及如何识别「垂直焦虑」和「扩张焦虑」。

assets.name: Platform Selection
assets.name_zh: 判断在资源有限的情况下，哪些平台值得深耕
assets.description: Judges platform selection decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断在资源有限的情况下，哪些平台值得深耕，哪些只做分发，哪些应该放弃。

assets.name: Authenticity Balance
assets.name_zh: 判断内容创作中的算法优化行为是否损伤了真
assets.description: Judges authenticity balance decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断内容创作中的算法优化行为是否损伤了真实性，以及累积的小妥协是否正在改变内容的本质。

assets.name: Content Depth
assets.name_zh: 判断某个内容应该做到什么深度，避免两个极
assets.description: Judges content depth decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断某个内容应该做到什么深度，避免两个极端：过于表面无法建立专家信任，过于深度超出受众接受能力或制作资源。

assets.name: Originality Judgment
assets.name_zh: 判断一个内容是否有真正的原创价值——独特
assets.description: Judges originality judgment decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断一个内容是否有真正的原创价值——独特的洞察、数据、角度，还是只是把别人已经说好的东西重新包装。

assets.name: Topic Selection
assets.name_zh: 判断一个候选选题是否值得投入时间和精力创
assets.description: Judges topic selection decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断一个候选选题是否值得投入时间和精力创作。核心问题：这个选题能给我的核心受众带来别处找不到的价值吗？

assets.name: Audience Signal
assets.name_zh: 帮助创作者正确解读受众反馈信号，区分真实
assets.description: Judges audience signal decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 帮助创作者正确解读受众反馈信号，区分真实需求与表面噪音，做出基于真实数据的内容决策。

assets.name: Community Engagement
assets.name_zh: 帮助创作者判断何时、以何种深度与受众互动
assets.description: Judges community engagement decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 帮助创作者判断何时、以何种深度与受众互动，在建立社区连接和保护创作精力之间找到可持续的平衡点。

assets.name: Controversy Navigation
assets.name_zh: 帮助创作者判断面对争议性话题时，发声、保
assets.description: Judges controversy navigation decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 帮助创作者判断面对争议性话题时，发声、保持中立还是回避——基于真实代价与价值的分析，而非情绪或从众。

assets.name: Monetization Timing
assets.name_zh: 判断开始变现的时机是否成熟。核心问题：现
assets.description: Judges monetization timing decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断开始变现的时机是否成熟。核心问题：现在变现是「受众已经准备好了」，还是「我急于获得回报」？

assets.name: Offer Design
assets.name_zh: 判断自有产品/课程/服务的形态、定价和目
assets.description: Judges offer design decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断自有产品/课程/服务的形态、定价和目标受众是否设计正确。核心问题：我的产品是「受众真正需要的解决方案」，还是「我能做的内容的商业版本」？

assets.name: Sponsorship Selection
assets.name_zh: 判断一个赞助合作是否值得接受。核心问题：
assets.description: Judges sponsorship selection decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 判断一个赞助合作是否值得接受。核心问题：这个合作带来的收入，是否值得它消耗的受众信任？

assets.name: Creator Sustainability
assets.name_zh: 帮助创作者在财务、精力、动机三个维度上评
assets.description: Judges creator sustainability decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 帮助创作者在财务、精力、动机三个维度上评估创作模式的可持续性，在燃尽发生之前识别早期信号并做出结构性调整。

assets.name: Publishing Rhythm
assets.name_zh: 帮助创作者找到「质量临界频率」——在这个
assets.description: Judges publishing rhythm decisions for content creators — when to optimize, when to hold, and what signals matter most.
assets.description_zh: 帮助创作者找到「质量临界频率」——在这个节奏下能稳定产出高质量内容，而不是追求算法要求的最大化频率或随意降低频率。

assets.name: Creator Brand Positioning
assets.name_zh: 创作者品牌定位判断
assets.description: Judges whether a creator's brand positioning is clear, defensible, and unoccupied. Uses the four-cell test (OCCUPIED / DEFENSIBLE / RESONANT / VERIFIABLE) to determine if a candidate positioning is ready to publish.
assets.description_zh: 判断创作者的品牌定位是否清晰、稳固、无人占领。用四格测试（OCCUPIED / DEFENSIBLE / RESONANT / VERIFIABLE）判断候选定位是否可发布。

assets.name: Viral Topic Selection
assets.name_zh: 爆款选题判断
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate content topics for viral potential — checking tension, curiosity gap, emotional resonance, and social currency.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断内容选题的传播潜力——检查冲突张力、好奇心缺口、情绪共鸣和社交货币。
assets.legacy_note: Published 2026-06 under the pre-pipeline strategy. Built with kdna-studio-cli < 0.6.0; uses the older source schema (scenarios / growth_stages). Not part of the A-layer flagship pipeline. See the legacy assets audit plan (private).
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Title Attraction
assets.name_zh: 标题吸引力判断
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate title attraction — checking audience clarity, information gap, specific benefit, credibility, and promise-content alignment.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断标题吸引力——检查受众明确度、信息缺口、具体利益、可信度和承诺匹配度。
assets.legacy_note: Published 2026-06 under the pre-pipeline strategy. Built with kdna-studio-cli < 0.6.0; uses the older source schema (scenarios / growth_stages). Not part of the A-layer flagship pipeline. See the legacy assets audit plan (private).
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Short Video Hook Judgment
assets.name_zh: 短视频前三秒判断
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate short video opening hooks — checking first-3-second gap, scene conflict, speakability, and audience retention signals.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断短视频开头前三秒的钩子效果——检查信息缺口、场景冲突、口播顺口度和留存信号。
assets.legacy_note: Published 2026-06 under the pre-pipeline strategy. Built with kdna-studio-cli < 0.6.0; uses the older source schema (scenarios / growth_stages). Not part of the A-layer flagship pipeline. See the legacy assets audit plan (private).
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Project Context Judgment
assets.name_zh: 项目上下文判断
assets.description: Judges what belongs in an Agent-facing project document (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules) — classifying each candidate line into CARRY / RELOCATE / DROP / CONVERT.
assets.description_zh: 判断 AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules 等项目文档的每一行内容——将候选行归类为 CARRY / RELOCATE / DROP / CONVERT。

source_payload_parity.reasoning_chains_note: build derives failure_modes from axioms (1 axiom = 1 chain); source's 4 reasoning_chains are imported as reasoning cards but consumed by a different mechanism

assets.build_coverage_notes: Source fields that DO NOT enter the structured payload as a named field (they enter via a different mechanism or are documentation-only): (a) KDNA_Patterns.json.terminology.{standard_terms,banned_terms} — kdna-studio-core/src/compile/index.js:165-166 hardcodes these to empty arrays in the structured payload, BUT compileEvolution generates one stage per locked term/banned_term card, so the content reaches the payload as evolution.stages entries (not as a structured field). (b) KDNA_Evolution.json.stages — compileEvolution ignores source.stages and regenerates from card.audit_log; the source's 4 evolution stages appear as 4 of the 48 total payload.evolution.stages entries (the other 44 are derived from axiom / scenario / self_check / case / reasoning cards). (c) reasoning_chains → failure_modes is a DIFFERENT-MECHANISM derivation (1 axiom = 1 chain). These are the known build-coverage limitations of kdna-studio-core v0.6.4. They do not block release; they are documented here for honesty.
assets.previous_version_status: v0.1.0 and v0.1.1 are preserved on GitHub Releases as historical previews but are NOT in this index. v0.1.2 is the first version to pass the 10-gate release standard.
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Completion Adjudication
assets.name_zh: 完成度裁定
assets.description: Judges whether an AI Agent's 'I'm done' claim is actually done. Forces four cells before the 'done' word: DONE CLAIM / OBSERVABLE PROOF / USER INTENT MATCH / UNRESOLVED RISK.
assets.description_zh: 判断 Agent 的「我做完了」声明是否真的完成。要求四格：完成声明 / 可观察证据 / 用户意图匹配 / 未解决风险，缺一格不可说「完成」。

source_payload_parity.reasoning_chains_note: build derives failure_modes from axioms (1 axiom = 1 chain); the 5 source reasoning_chains are imported as reasoning cards. For completion_adjudication the counts match by design (5 axioms, 5 chains).

assets.build_coverage_notes: Source fields that DO NOT enter the structured payload as a named field (they enter via a different mechanism or are documentation-only): (a) KDNA_Patterns.json.terminology.{standard_terms,banned_terms} — kdna-studio-core/src/compile/index.js:165-166 hardcodes these to empty arrays in the structured payload, BUT compileEvolution generates one stage per locked term/banned_term card, so the content reaches the payload as evolution.stages entries (not as a structured field). For this asset: 3 standard_terms → 3 term stages; 18 banned_terms → 18 banned_term stages. (b) KDNA_Evolution.json.stages — compileEvolution ignores source.stages and regenerates from card.audit_log; the source's 4 evolution stages appear as 4 of the 58 total payload.evolution.stages entries (the other 54 are derived from axiom / scenario / self_check / case / reasoning / banned_term / term / framework cards). (c) reasoning_chains → failure_modes is a DIFFERENT-MECHANISM derivation (1 axiom = 1 chain). These are the known build-coverage limitations of kdna-studio-core v0.6.4. They do not block release; they are documented here for honesty.
assets.previous_version_status: v0.1.0 is preserved on GitHub Releases as a historical preview but is NOT in this index. v0.1.1 is the first version to pass the 10-gate publish standard.
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

note: Contains 31 dev assets (developer audience, Layer 1) and 16 creator assets (creator audience, Layer 2). All assets produced by the kdna-assets-internal 10-gate pipeline.
